# Scrubbys SG

> Singapore-owned professional cleaning company specialising in residential deep cleaning, founded 2022. Serves HDB flats, condominiums, and landed properties across Singapore. NEA licensed, bizSAFE Level 3 certified.

## Services
- Post Renovation Cleaning: from $350 (300 to 599 sft), scales by size
- End of Tenancy Cleaning: from $380 (300 to 599 sft), scales by size
- Spring Cleaning: from $380 (300 to 599 sft), scales by size
- Upholstery Cleaning: sofa, mattress, curtains, carpet/rug, chairs
- Floor Deep Scrub (Rotowash Floor Scrub): vinyl, cement, tiles, parquet, engineered timber, marble, from $250
- Formaldehyde Treatment: from $288, includes pre and post air quality readings
- Standalone Cleaning: oven and hood degreasing, window clean and polish, toilet deep clean, quoted individually
- Kitchen Exhaust Duct & F&B Area Cleaning: commercial kitchens, restaurants, cafes, quoted after site inspection
- Specialised & High Level Cleaning: chandelier cleaning, high level cleaning, quoted individually
- Other Services: painting, handyman, marble and parquet polishing, aircon servicing

## Condo Pricing
For condo units, pricing is based on whichever is bigger: unit size or number of bedrooms.
- 1 bedder: equivalent to 300 to 599 sft
- 2 bedder: equivalent to 600 to 799 sft
- 3 bedder: equivalent to 800 to 1299 sft
- 4 bedder: equivalent to 1300 to 1599 sft
- 5 bedder or more: equivalent to 1600 sft and above
This applies to Post Renovation Cleaning, End of Tenancy Cleaning, Spring Cleaning, Floor Deep Scrub, and Formaldehyde Treatment.

## Booking Terms
- Deposit required to confirm booking, typically $150 to $200
- Time slots are first come first serve
- Rescheduling: 1 free reschedule, then $60 fee for late changes (less than 3 days notice) or subsequent changes
- Cancellation: deposit fully forfeited per service booked
- Full terms at the Booking & Service Terms page

- UEN: 202313458R
